The imported history from everybodywiki is patchwork and contains all the contributing users, but not all the revisions are actually present. Lets hope this is sufficient attribution though especially since most of them are mine.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:28, 2 May 2025 (UTC)}}

{{afc comment|1=Page originally made on english wikipedia in draftspace. g13 deleted and archived on everybodywiki. Go to [[:en:Wikipedia:Requests for undeletion]] to request undeletion of original page [[:en:draft:Succor in Travail]] and import the revisions to here for attribution. View on everybodywiki here [[:every:Succor in Travail|Succor in Travail]]. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:01, 16 February 2025 (UTC)}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}in Easterrn orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>
{{ill|ru:Поможение родам|every|8=en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ru:Поможение родам|qq=}}==Overview=

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|ru|Православная иконография Богородицы|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|qq=}}
* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

== References ==
{{примечания}}

== Literature ==
* {{книга|автор={{ill|Talberg, Nikolay Dmitrievich|ru|Тальберг, Николай Дмитриевич|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Talberg, Nikolay Dmitrievich|qq=}}|заглавие=Detailed Menologion of Saints in the Russian Land|издание=Reprint|место=SPb.|издательство=Vera|год=1997|страницы=519–520}}
* {{книга|автор=Suvarova E. Yu.|заглавие=Russian Icons of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth' (18th–20th Centuries): Iconography Problems|место=Moscow|издательство=Saint Tikhon’s Orthodox University Press|год=2007|страницы=417–437}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}in Easterrn orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>
{{ill|ru:Поможение родам|every|8=en|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ru:Поможение родам|qq=}}==Overview=

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==

* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|ru|Православная иконография Богородицы|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|qq=}}
* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.

* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|ru|Православная иконография Богородицы|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|qq=}}
* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|ru|Православная иконография Богородицы|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|qq=}}
* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.

* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|ru|Православная иконография Богородицы|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|qq=}}
* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

{{afc comment|1=Page originally made on english wikipedia in draftspace. g13 deleted and archived on everybodywiki. Go to [[:en:Wikipedia:Requests for undeletion]] to request undeletion of original page [[:en:draft:Succor in Travail]] and import the revisions to here for attribution. View on everybodywiki here [[:every:Succor in Travail|Succor in Travail]]. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:01, 16 February 2025 (UTC)}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|ru|Православная иконография Богородицы|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|qq=}}
* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

== References ==
{{примечания}}

== Literature ==
* {{книга|автор={{ill|Talberg, Nikolay Dmitrievich|ru|Тальберг, Николай Дмитриевич|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Talberg, Nikolay Dmitrievich|qq=}}|заглавие=Detailed Menologion of Saints in the Russian Land|издание=Reprint|место=SPb.|издательство=Vera|год=1997|страницы=519–520}}
* {{книга|автор=Suvarova E. Yu.|заглавие=Russian Icons of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth' (18th–20th Centuries): Iconography Problems|место=Moscow|издательство=Saint Tikhon’s Orthodox University Press|год=2007|страницы=417–437}}

== See Also ==
* {{ill|Conqueror of Breads|ru|Спорительница хлебов|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conqueror of Breads|qq=}}
* {{ill|Holy Virgin Mary of Seven Swords|ru|Семистрельная икона|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Holy Virgin Mary of Seven Swords|qq=}}
* {{ill|Our Lady Beneficial Sky|ru|Благодатное Небо|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Our Lady Beneficial Sky|qq=}}
* {{ill|Softening of Evil Hearts|ru|Умягчение злых сердец|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Softening of Evil Hearts|qq=}}
* {{ill|Succor in Travail|ru|Поможение родам|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Succor in Travail|qq=}}
* {{ill|Unfading Flower|ru|Неувядаемый Цвет|fr|Icône de la Vierge à la fleur qui ne fane pas|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unfading Flower|qq=}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==

* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|ru|Православная иконография Богородицы|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|qq=}}
* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|ru|Православная иконография Богородицы|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|qq=}}
* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|ru|Православная иконография Богородицы|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|qq=}}
* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

[[File:Pomozhenie v rodah 19th century icon.jpg|thumb]]Succor in Travail also known as Help in Childbirth is a {{ill|Marian apparition|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Marian apparition|qq=}}<nowiki/>in Eastern orthodoxy.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Icon of the Most Holy Theotokos the Succor in Travail - L |url=https://www.istok.net/Icon-of-the-Most-Holy-Theotokos-the-Succor-in-Travail-L.html |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=Istok Church Supplies Corp.}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=JB-014 "The Icon of The Most Holy Theotokos Succor in Travail" |url=https://charivna-mit.com/jb-014-quot-the-icon-of-the-most-holy-theotokos-succor-in-travail-quot |access-date=2023-11-04 |website=charivna-mit.com}}</ref>

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|ru|Православная иконография Богородицы|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Iconography of the Theotokos|qq=}}
* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}

==Overview==

'''Pomozhenie Rodam Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Поможение родам») — a revered {{ill|icon|ru|икона|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/icon|qq=}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mother of God|qq=}}, honored in the {{ill|Orthodox Church|ru|Православная церковь|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Orthodox Church|qq=}} for aiding women in childbirth. The icon is also known as ''Pomoshchnitsa v Rodakh'' ('Helper in Childbirth') or ''Pomogatelnitsa Zhenam Chady Rozhdati'' ('Helper to Women Bearing Children'). Its feast day is {{СС|8|January|||26|December}}.

== Iconography ==
The icon’s origin is unknown, but two traditional depictions exist:
* The Mother of God is shown full-length with her hands raised in prayer, and the Christ Child appears on her chest, similar to the {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}.
* The Mother of God is depicted with uncovered hair and crossed hands on her chest, with the Christ Child below, blessing with an {{ill|Old Believer sign|ru|Именословное перстосложение|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Believer sign|qq=}}. The entire image is placed on a crescent moon<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|title=Icon of the Mother of God 'Helper in Childbirth'|access-date=2022-04-18|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220418185415/https://azbyka.ru/days/ikona-pomoshchnica-v-rodah|archive-date=2022-04-18}}</ref>.

The icon’s veneration was especially strong before the revolution, with the feast on December 26 (Old Style) coinciding with the traditional midwives' festival known as {{ill|Babyi Kashi|ru|Бабьи каши|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Babyi Kashi|qq=}}, celebrated in southern and western Russia and Siberia<ref>{{СДЭС|Бабин день|автор={{ill|Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|ru|Зеленина, Эльвира Ивановна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zelenina, Elvira Ivanovna|qq=}}, {{ill|Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|ru|Седакова, Ирина Александровна|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sedakova, Irina Alexandrovna|qq=}}|том=1|страницы=123–125}}</ref>.
== See Also ==

* {{ill|Blessed Womb|ru|Блаженное чрево|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Blessed Womb|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sign Icon of the Theotokos|ru|Знамение Божией Матери|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sign Icon of the Theotokos|qq=}}
